title: Page Schema
description: Root schema for all pages in the Polyglot Dev Atlas.

schema_version.description: Schema version for this page (enables graceful backwards compatibility).

title.description: Main page title (browser tab, search index).

description.description: Page description for SEO and search indexing.

body_class.description: Custom CSS classes to inject into the body element.

extra_assets.description: Additional CSS/JS files to load for this page (relative to assets/).

style.description: Default style preset for all child blocks (inherited downward).

content.description: Array of content blocks (inherits from base_block schema).

code_defaults.description: Default properties for code blocks on this page.
